calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Personal Property To Trustee; And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. HAIG ARSEN HARRIS JR. FOR THE PETITIONER JANET HARDEN; ATTY ALBERT MARTIN FOR THE RESPONDENT JOAN COYLE; ATTY. DON DOWLING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

ATTY. HARRIS REPORTED TO THE COURT THAT HIS CLIENT RECEIVED $150,000.00, WHICH WAS DEPOSITED TO THE TRUST, ISSUES REGARDING SANCTION WERE STILL PENDING. ATTY. MARTIN DID NOT KNOW IF HE WAS ENTITLED TO FILE AN OPPOSITION TO THE SANCTION OR IS CONSIDERED AS A CONTEST. THE COURT TOOK THE ISSUE UNDER SUBMISSION.

JUDGE: JOHN DEARMAN; REPORTER: KATH BERSAMIN, CSR, 1172; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; BAILIFF: FELICIA SMITH

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Personal Property To Trustee; And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-28-2007 Continued To Dec-12-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Personal Property To Trustee; And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Continued To Nov-28-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Niel Turner and Haig Harris appeared for Janet Harnden (Trustee/Executor). Albert Martin and Don Dowling appeared for Joan Coyle.

The Court suggested mediation. Mr. Harris stated that settlement in the Appeal matter was unsuccessful, and that mediation would not be productive. All parties presented arguement on the issues regarding property and cash assets. The Court found that it would be a contest and signed the order in open court. The Court continued the Petition to Determine Title to November 28, 2007.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: A. Aguerre. He requests that the petition be denied.

Application For Determination That Proposed Response To Petition For Order Directing Transfer Of Personal Property Does Not Violate The Terms Of The No Contest In Decedent'S Trust And Will.
Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Denied

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Personal Property To Trustee; And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-18-2007 Continued To Oct-30-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Haig Harris and Neil Turner appearing for and with successor trustee. Don Dowling and Albert Martin appearing for Joan Coyle. Mr. Dowling requested for continuance. Mr. Harris opposed a continuance. Mr. Dowling indicated that he got the case not long ago and he has notified Mr. Harris 10 days ago that he will request for continuance. Mr. Harris argued that Mr. Dowling is aware of this petition some time ago and he has agreed to a continuance in the past. Mr. Dowling will file a safe harbor petition tomorrow. Court is setting a hearing on 10/30 for the safe harbor petition. Matter is continued to 10/30.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Personal Property To Trustee; And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-10-2007 Continued To Sep-18-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Personal Property To Trustee; And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-01-2007 Continued To Sep-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Pet. To Determine Whether Proposed Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-21-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Neil Turner and Haig Harris appearing for and with trustee. Steven Piser and Monica Dell'osso appearing for petitioner Joan Coyle. Court's tentative ruling is petition is denied. The proposed complaint would violate the no contest clause. 21305 does not apply. Oral argument presented by both sides. Ms. Dell'osso requested for Statement of Decision and a ruling on the evidentary objection. Evidentary objection is sustained. This is not an evidentary hearing and counsel is not entitled to a Statement of Decision. Tentative ruling stands. Petition is denied. The instrument is not protected by 21305. Mr. Harris will prepare an order and send it to other counsel for approval as to form. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.
